In this default state, satisfaction is achieved through physical sensations of the body created through material possessions. Intellect The job of the intellect is to finds ways to fulfill the desires of the heart It will rationalize and justify the means to the end

title: Horizon  Refraction Of Attributes
text: White light refracts into component colors when passed through a prism Allah is the light of the heavens and the earth: اللہ نور السموت والارض When this pure light of Allah's essence hits creation it refracts into the spectrum of these divine attributes. The عالم essentially serves as colossal theater for the divine manifestations of these attributes of Allah Acquisition of knowledge is similar to digesting food.

title: 8  Tatayyum
text: The تیم is a word used for a slave, but its not at the level of an عبد . It is a high degree of love where there is a type of servitude that goes with it

title: 2 Types of slavery
text: Freedom is an illusion . It is nothing more than the choice of enslavement. Freedom is the act of choosing who we submit or enslave ourselves to . There are two words for slave in Arabic. When an entity that is lower in a hierarchy, enslaves an entity that is higher in the hierarchy, the slave is called غلام غلام comes from the word غلم which means "to lust" or "to shackle" This master will always pull the slave downwards because it operates at a lower level This type of slavery is always forced When an entity that is lower in a hierarchy, submits itself to an entity that is higher in the hierarchy, the slave is called عبد This type of slavery is always out of free will and volition. This master will always raise the slave upwards because it operates at a higher level Quran demands this type of willing submission. This is why Allah always refers to his creation as عبد and never غلام

title: Satan Attacks The Head
text: A lot of the acts we are given in Islam are to protect us from the harm of evil Jinn, called شیاطین . One of the most important protections from Jinn is cleanliness - hygiene. Jinn love corruption, hence their favorite place of residence is toilets. This is why we cover our heads In the Jewish religion, yam-aka or the kip-pah literally translates to "dome". It's a small cap that is used to cover the parietal lobe. The function of the parietal lobe is to integrate information from different senses to build a coherent picture of the world. This allows us to coordinate our movements in response to the objects in our environment. This is why when we perform وضو and we do the مسح of the head we start right at the center of that parietal lobe. We pray اللھم عشنی برحمتک من رحمتک- Oh Allah cover, protect my intellect with your mercy. Make my intellect function under the influence of your mercy. The word in Arabic to be without a hat is حاسر الرأس which also means to be unarmed.

title: Compatible Friend
text: The word قرن is used in Arabic for a rope that is used to hold two camels together. So قرین is someone who is always side-by-side with you. He is joined-to-the-hip. A قرین is someone that you have a lot in common with. You cannot tie two camels together where one is very tall and the other is very short. There must be some equivalence between them. The word قرین can also mean people of the same community. In سورۃ صفات Allah talks about some of us who make it to جنۃ and we inquire about the other people in our families and community. Those Who Set the Ranks [37:50-55] [ سورۃ ۳۷] الصافات ‏فَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍۢ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ ‎ ۵۰ Then they will turn to one another, and question each other ‏قَالَ قَآئِلٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ إِنِّى كَانَ لِى قَرِينٌۭ ‎ ۵۱ A speaker of them will say: "Indeed, I had a companion, ‏يَقُولُ أَءِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُصَدِّقِينَ ‎ ۵۲ Who used to mock me! Who used to make fun of me and say: "Are you among those who believe?" Are you among those idiots who call themselves Muslims? ‏أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًۭا وَعِظَمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ ‎ ۵۳ Are you among those fools who say that when we die and become dust and bones, we shall indeed to receive reward or punishment?! ‏قَالَ هَلْ أَنتُم مُّطَّلِعُونَ ‎ ۵۴ In response he will answered: "Look down?" ‏فَٱطَّلَعَ فَرَآهُ فِى سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ ‎ ۵۵ So he will look down and see that person in the midst of hell Fire. Your قرین can make you a shining star and get you to the doorsteps of heaven; or he can ensure hell fire for you. Ornaments of Gold [43:36] [ سورۃ ۴۳] الزخرف ‏وَمَن يَعْشُ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱلرَّحْمَنِ نُقَيِّضْ لَهُۥ شَيْطَنًۭا فَهُوَ لَهُۥ قَرِينٌۭ ‎ ۳۶ And whosoever turns away from the remembrance of the intensely merciful, We shall appoint for him a شیطان to be a قرین to him.

title: Entrainment of the heart
text: Allah gave the heartbeat a rhythm. Oscillatory physics is the science of entrainment When the rhythm of an oscillating device synchronizes the rhythm of another device, that's called entrainment Soldiers naturally entrain when they walk on a bridge Entrainment creates amplification The spiritual heart entrains the remaining components The more we understand the meanings of لا الہ الا اللہ - the more our intellect, our soul and our body will entrain with it قال رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ و سلم اِنَّ فِی الجَسَدِ مُضغَۃً۔ وَأِذَا صَلَحَت صَلَحَ الْجَسَدُ کُلُّہُ، وَأِذَا فَسَدَتْ فَسَدَ الْجَسَدُ کُلُّہُ۔ اَلا وَ ھِیَ القَلْبُ Indeed within the body of a human being, there is a lump of flesh. When it is sound, the entire body is sound; and when it is corrupt the entire body is corrupt. Know that it is the heart If the heart is diseased, the entrainment will be diseased. But if the heart is sound, the entrainment will be sound

title: Salaat
text: The five daily prayers are physical manifestations of لا الہ الا اللہ and the entrainment of the rest of the spiritual hierarchy with the heart It begins with the rejection and the abandonment of whatever one was doing. Whatever worldly need, desire, pleasure or passion is trying to become the الہ , has to be rejected. The entire prayer is affirmation of الا اللہ - Allah is the only God The tongue and body are in perfect entrainment with the heart during prayers We elevate our hearts by submitting our intellects to Allah(Subhanahu wa Ta'ala) The heart can only find eternal rest and peace with Allah(Subhanahu wa Ta'ala) symbolized by death

title: Mercy Is a Weak Translation
text: The attribute رحمۃ is "the" primary attribute of Allah. It is an attribute that is most dear to Allah and he has made it obligatory on himself. In a HADEES, Rasul Allah(Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam) says: قال رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ و آلہ و سلم إنَّ الله لَمَّا قَضٰى الخَلق،كَتَبَ فَوقَ عَرْشُه اِنَّ رَحمَتِی تَغلِبُ غَضَبِی Indeed, after Allah established all his creation, he wrote on his throne, "Indeed my mercy shall overcome my wrath" The word رحمۃ is generally translated as "mercy", which distorts the meaning of the word as it implies escaping "punishment" When we constantly use this word "mercy" for Allah, with that subconscious taint of escaping punishment; and when we repeat it over and over again; it sort of creates this idea in our minds, that Allah wanted to do something bad to us, but then he decided not to do it.

title: Rehman
text: The word رحمن follows a particular phonetic pattern that represents "intensify", "ferocity", "severity", "extreme force of power". Any word in Arabic that follows this phonetic pattern of آن has these characteristics. Words like غضبان (extremely angry; intensely angry); جوعان (extremely hungry; ferociously hungry); عطشان (extremely thirsty). On this same pattern we have the word رحمن (extremely merciful; intensely merciful). You understand?

title: Raheem
text: The word الرحیم follows a particular phonetic pattern that represents "permanence" and "long term" existence. All words that follow this pattern have the same two qualities - کریم، سلیم، حکیم، جمیل، جلیل

title: Rehman Before Raheem
text: Everywhere in the Quran, we find الرحمن mentioned first, followed by الرحیم . If Allah had only said الرحمن then his love, care, concern and mercy would have been extreme, but it would have been immediate; If Allah only said الرحیم his love and mercy would have been permanent, but it would not have been extreme. Someone once asked أبن عباس رضی اللہ عنہ about the difference between الرحمن and الرحیم . He said Allah is between الرحمن in this life and he is الرحیم in the after life. Because the love and care of Allah disappears for disbelievers on the day of judgment. رحمتی وسعت علی کل شیء My mercy extends to all. No other HADEES (in my opinion) illustrates his رحمۃ more than the following: َما مِن یَوم اِلاَّوالبَحرُ یَستَئذِنُ رَبَّہُ فی اَن یورِقُ ابن آدم Not a single day passes by, that the ocean asks its master, Ya Allah! Give me permission, let me drown these disbelievers!! والارضُ یَستَئذِنُ فی أَن تَبتَلِعَہُ The earth begs its master, Oh Ya Allah! Allow me to swallow them alive where they stand والملائکۃ یَستَئذِنُ فی ان تُعاَجِلَہُ وَ تُھلِکُہ Angels say..... Ya Allah give us permission! We will destroy them! We will annihilate them! (Allah responds to them by saying) دَعُو عَبدِی فأنا أَعلَمُ بِعَبدِی مِنکُم ۔ ان کان عبدَکم فَشَأنَکم بِہِ۔ وأن کان عبدی فَمِنِّی وأِلیَّ عبدی Let them be! Leave them alone! I love my creation way more than that. If they are your creation, do whatever you please with them! But if they're my creation, then hand them over to me and and you step out of the way. I will deal with my creation! یسأل الملائکۃ: فلماذا عقدُہُ؟ The angels ask: What are you waiting for? یستجیب اللہ: إنني أتطَّلِع إلى التوبتَہُ I am waiting for their repentance أِن اتانی نھاراً قبلتہ أِن اتانی لیلا قبلتہ If he approaches me during the day time, I will accept him; if he approaches me during the night time I will accept him. مَن تَقَرَّبَ أِلَیَّ تَلَقَّیتُہُ مِن بَعِید If anyone takes one single step towards me, I approach him by running towards him. وَ مَن أَعرَضَ عَنِّی ناَدَیتُہُ عَن قَرِیب And if anyone walks away from me, then I go after him to bring him closer and I ask him: أَوَلَکَ رَبٌّ غَیرِی؟ Do you have another master who is more loving than me? الحَسَنَۃُ عِندِی بِعَشرِأَمثَالِھَا وَ أَزِید I take one good deed from you and reward you 10 times for it, in fact even more! وَوَصَّیَّتُ عِندِی بِمِثلِھَا وأَعفُو و أغْفَر But I count your sin as a single sin and when you repent, I even forgive that and reward you for your repentance. فَأَيْنَ تَذْهَبُونَ Then where are you going?

title: Linguistic Meaning Of Word REHMA
text: Linguistically speaking the word رحمۃ means to show love, care, concern and mercy in order to benefit someone. The ancient Arab would say: الرحمۃُ، رِقَّۃٌ تَقتَدِ الأحسانُ أِلی المَرحوم رحمۃ is a kind of love or tenderness that is intended to benefit the beloved. In other words, رحمۃ is precisely targeted towards benefiting someone. It has to translate into a beneficial action for someone, or its not رحمۃ .

title: Strive vs struggle
text: We always strive "for" something and struggle "against" something. The نفس الوامۃ that wants to rise higher towards morality, has to struggle against the lower state of نفس الامارۃ that is inclined towards the sensations of the body. This internal battle is the concept of جھاد in the Islamic framework. People asked Rasul Allah(Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam) أَیُّھَا الجِھَاد أَفضَلُ یا رَسُول اللہ؟ What is the highest form of جھاد o messenger of Allah? He replied: أَنْ تُجَاھَدَ نَفْسَکَ فِی طَاعَۃِ اللہ The greatest of all جھاد is that you struggle against your soul in the path of Allah Since this struggle is a battle, sometimes the soul wins over the physical passions and sometimes it loses, which then creates guilt.

title: 9  Ta'abbud
text: The next stage is تعبد where the lover becomes a complete slave to the beloved. There is complete obedience in addition to servitude. This is an honorific title of the Messenger of Allah(Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam). سُبْحَنَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَسْرَىٰ بِعَبْدِهِ لَيْلًۭا Glorious is the one who took his slave for a journey in the night.

title: Argument Of Iblis
text: The Cow [2:34] [ سورۃ ۲] البقرۃ ‏وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلَٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِآدَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكَفِرِينَ ‎ ۳۴ And when We said to the angels: "Prostrate yourselves before Adam.". And they prostrated except Iblîs , he refused and was proud and was one of the disbelievers. The Heights [7:12] [ سورۃ ۷] الاعراف ‏قَالَ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَلَّا تَسْجُدَ إِذْ أَمَرْتُكَ ۖ قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْهُ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍۢ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍۢ ‎ ۱۲ said: "What prevented you that you did not prostrate, when I commanded you?" Iblîs said: "I am better than him, You created me from fire, and him You created from clay." Iblis searched for superiority in material - مادۃ . He looked at the outward aspects of creation Analysis of the argument posed by Iblis Fire is bright, whereas clay is dull Fire illuminates, whereas clay does not Fire is hot, clay is cold The flames of fire rise up towards the sky, whereas the particles of clay always fall towards the earth Iblis used deductive reasoning, which in Arabic is called قیاس . The word قیاس literally means measurement. Allah's reason for asking angels to prostrate Allah's soul and his knowledge is greater than any body Soul is made from spiritual material; bodies are made from physical material Knowledge of the soul is eternal, status of the body is ephemeral Soul is energy, body is mass and density The state of the soul is immutable, the state of the body is mutable Energy is powerful, mass is weak Soul is the motivator, the mover; body is that which is moved

title: Response Of Iblis To Disobedience
text: The Heights [7:13] [ سورۃ ۷] الاعراف ‏قَالَ فَٱهْبِطْ مِنْهَا فَمَا يَكُونُ لَكَ أَن تَتَكَبَّرَ فِيهَا فَٱخْرُجْ إِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلصَّغِرِينَ ‎ ۱۳ said: " get down from this, it is not for you to be arrogant here. Get out, for you are of those humiliated and disgraced." The Heights [7:14] [ سورۃ ۷] الاعراف ‏قَالَ أَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ ‎ ۱۴ said: "Allow me respite till the Day they are raised up." The Heights [7:15] [ سورۃ ۷] الاعراف ‏قَالَ إِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ ‎ ۱۵ said: "You are of those allowed respite." The Heights [7:16] [ سورۃ ۷] الاعراف ‏قَالَ فَبِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأَقْعُدَنَّ لَهُمْ صِرَطَكَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ ‎ ۱۶ said: "Because You have sent me astray, surely I will sit in wait against them on Your Straight Path. The Heights [7:17] [ سورۃ ۷] الاعراف ‏ثُمَّ لَآتِيَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ وَعَنْ أَيْمَنِهِمْ وَعَن شَمَآئِلِهِمْ ۖ وَلَا تَجِدُ أَكْثَرَهُمْ شَكِرِينَ ‎ ۱۷ Then I will come to them from before them and behind them, from their right and from their left, and You will not find most of them as thankful ones." The Heights [7:18] [ سورۃ ۷] الاعراف ‏قَالَ ٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا مَذْءُومًۭا مَّدْحُورًۭا ۖ لَّمَن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ ‎ ۱۸ said "Get out from this disgraced and expelled. Whoever of them will follow you, then surely I will fill Hell with you all."

title: Response Of Adam & Hawwa To Disobedience
text: We learn from the story of آدم and ھوی that both also disobeyed Allah as well. They were forbidden to eat from the tree, which they did; and much like Iblis they too incurred Allah's wrath. The same word of expulsion اھبطو is used for both. Response Of Iblis: ‏قَالَ فَبِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى Response of آدم and ھوی قَالاَ رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَآ أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَـسِرِينَ Master we have wronged ourselves! And if you don't forgive us if you don't have mercy on us we will surely become from among the losers The Cow [2:37] [ سورۃ ۲] البقرۃ ‏فَتَلَقَّىٰٓ آدَمُ مِن رَّبِّهِۦ كَلِمَتٍۢ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ ‎ ۳۷ Then Adam received from his Lord Words. And his Lord pardoned him. Verily, He is the One Who forgives, the Most Merciful. The moral of these stories is learning the response to disobedience. Iblis disobeyed, and completely gave up hope in the mercy of Allah. Adam and Hawwa on the other hand, after disobeying Allah, and realizing their mistake, chose the exact opposite path. They rushed towards Allah's mercy and his forgiveness. They chose the path of repentance. We are all children of Adam AS. We are not children our Iblis. The Troops [39:53] [ سورۃ ۳۹] الزمر ‏ قُلْ يَعِبَادِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسْرَفُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ لَا تَقْنَطُوا۟ مِن رَّحْمَةِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ جَمِيعًا ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ ‎ ۵۳ With every act of disobedience we are all faced with a choice - Do we follow the path of Iblis? Or do we follow the path of Adam?

title: Self Reflection
text: Another amazing benefit of calamities is that it reveal to us who we really are Allah says: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَٱلْحَيَوٰةَ لِيَبْلُوَكُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًۭا In reality the test is for self revelation We dream big because we have been created in God's image Tribulations and calamities provide a mirror in which we can accurately judge ourselves and others Allah gave us the ability to see everyone and everything, but we cannot see ourselves The goal is to see us through others The Spider [29:2-3] [ سورۃ ۲۹] العنکبوت ‏أَحَسِبَ ٱلنَّاسُ أَن يُتْرَكُوٓا۟ أَن يَقُولُوٓا۟ آمَنَّا وَهُمْ لَا يُفْتَنُونَ ‎ ۲ ‏وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۖ فَلَيَعْلَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ صَدَقُوا۟ وَلَيَعْلَمَنَّ ٱلْكَذِبِينَ ‎ ۳ ( 2 ) Do people think that they will be left alone because they say: "We believe," and will not be tested. ( 3 ) And We indeed tested those who were before them. And Allah will certainly make known those who are true, and will certainly make known those who are liars,. The word فتنۃ means to test gold for alloys.

title: What If vs What Is
text: Allah SWT created two types of signs for us. Signs of the Quran - آیات القرآنیۃ Signs of this universe - آیات اکونییۃ . The آیات القرآنیۃ push us into the universe to study the cosmological signs, in order to reach the conclusion that there has to be a creator, a higher power for all of this to exist. The آیات اکونییۃ- the cosmological signs - push us back into the Quran to learn more about the nature of this creator. Human beings lose themselves in the study of these signs, which Allah describes as: The Poets [26:225] [ سورۃ ۲۶] الشعرائ ‏أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّهُمْ فِى كُلِّ وَادٍۢ يَهِيمُونَ ‎ ۲۲۵ Do you not see how they wander aimlessly in every valley The word یھمون comes from the ھامَ , which means to wander somewhere to the point of no return. Why does Quran constantly uses the camel and the Arab as an example? Spiritual heart is a camel of the intellect Philosophy is rooted in the deductive logic of "what if" Quran is rooted in the inductive logic of "what is" When you are living in the world of what if, by definition, you are denying the world of "what is"

title: Linguistic view of Quran and Surah
text: Quran ( قرآن ) The most common meaning of the word Quran is "to recite" which comes from the root قرأ Rasul Allah(Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam) used to go to the cave of HIRA ( غار الحرا ) to meditate. The word حرا comes from the word حُر which means freedom. So غار الحرا is literally translated as "the cave of freedom". "Read" or "recite" was the very first command that was issued to our prophet (Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam) [ سورۃ ۹۶] العلق ‏ ٱقْرَأْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ‎ ۱ ‏خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَنَ مِنْ عَلَقٍ ‎ ۲ ‏ ٱقْرَأْ وَرَبُّكَ ٱلْأَكْرَمُ ‎ ۳ ‏ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَ بِٱلْقَلَمِ ‎ ۴ ‏عَلَّمَ ٱلْإِنسَنَ مَا لَمْ يَعْلَمْ ‎ ۵ ( 1 ) Read! In the Name of your Lord, Who has created, ( 2 ) Has created man from a clot. ( 3 ) Read! And your Lord is the Most Generous, ( 4 ) Who has taught by the pen, ( 5 ) Has taught man that which he knew not. Quran is also close to the word قُری , which means village, which creates the metaphor of a distinction between civilization and a jungle. Within a village there is law and order; and outside in the jungle is chaos and disorder. Jungle is a place of constant and imminent danger, which is symbolized by this world ( دنیا ) filled with powerful and dangerous beasts. The beasts are desires, temptations, excitements, attractions, lust - for wealth, for power, for food, for women. These can be extremely powerful and overpowering emotions Once again the intellect is presented with a choice between the village and the jungle. Are you going to bind yourself within the confines and safety of the village of Quran? Or will you keep wandering aimlessly and lose yourself in the jungle of this دنیا ? Village enables civilization. To be civilized means to live with others in peace and harmony. The first reason for entering a village is personal safety The second is to provide safety to others by interacting with them in a civilized manner, and not causing harm to them. These are the 2 things Quran teaches us: حقوق النفس - Rights of the soul حقوق العباد - Rights of others. History shows that the Quran did. It took the most barbaric people of that time - these بَدُّ Arabs - and it transformed them into perfect civilized human beings. Surah ( سورۃ ) The word سورۃ comes from the root word " سور " which means a fort, or the outer walls of a structure. Every سورۃ within the village of Quran, has been fortified like the outer walls of a house. Every سورۃ has been clearly demarcated. You know what is inside the سورۃ and what is outside it. Quran is the metaphorical village that separates and protects its inhabitants from the dangers of the jungle. Inside we find 114 structures called ( سورۃ ). Each سورۃ having its own boundaries, its own theme, its own purpose, clearly separating one from another. Inside these structures, we find آیات which are things that are precious, that are valuable, that have meaning and purpose, that clearly distinguishes one thing from another and that can be used as evidence. At any given time there is a lot going on within a village just as there is a lot going on inside the Quran. The central purpose of Quran is تقوی - piety.

title: DARAJAAT vs DARAKAAT
text: Quran talks about two phenomena. First is دجرات which are stairs moving upward Second is درکات which are stairs moving downwards The only letter that is different in the two words is the letters ج and the letter ک . The letter ج in Arabic is a harsh letter - it has a harshness ( شِدَّۃ ) on it The letter ک is lighter on the tongue, and does not have the same hardness. And so نفس الامارۃ is is naturally inclined towards درکات , and that's why it's easy and pleasurable. نفس الوامۃ is a state that is trying to move upwards - towards دجرات , and in doing so, it literally needs to overcome the gravity of lust which is why it finds it challenging.

title: The rational soul
text: The word مطمئنۃ comes from the root word طمن , which means rest or secure. Another derivative is أطمأنان which means satisfaction or contentment. A closely related word is سکون which comes from سکن , and means tranquility. سکینۃ is "that" which provides tranquility and the feeling of calmness to an anxious heart. There are 3 things very important to understand about أطمأنان . This level of أطمأنان or tranquility is achieved through the certitude, the absolute conviction of God's existence. There is a difference between theoretical knowledge ( علم ) and experiential knowledge ( معرفۃ ) This أطمأنان is not the state of renouncing happiness or giving up the desire to be happy. It is finding happiness in the happiness of the beloved. It is about making the desires of the beloved, one's own desire. What manifest out of this أطمأنان , is أمن - which means safety or security. Safety from the desire to commit sin. In سورۃ الفجر , Allah speaks to the نفس and says: The Dawn [89:27-30] [ سورۃ ۸۹] الفجر ‏يَٓأَيَّتُهَا ٱلنَّفْسُ ٱلْمُطْمَئِنَّةُ ‎ ۲۷ :"O the one in rest and satisfaction! ‏ٱرْجِعِىٓ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكِ رَاضِيَةًۭ مَّرْضِيَّةًۭ ‎ ۲۸ "Come back to your Lord, Well-pleased and well-pleasing unto Him! ‏فَٱدْخُلِى فِى عِبَدِى ‎ ۲۹ "Enter you, then, among My honoured slaves, ‏وَٱدْخُلِى جَنَّتِى ‎ ۳۰ "And enter you My Paradise!"

title: Meanings Of Word Ilah
text: YA'LOO WORSHIP The Primarily meaning comes from اَلَہَ یَعلُہُ , which to worship. Worship is an extreme form of gratitude. This word أَلَہَ is used for a child that is thirsty for the milk of its mother, and is desperately crying for it The next word is وَلَہَ .which is someone you are passionately in love with. The next meaning أَلِہَ is literally (not linguistically) used for something that you lean on. Another derivative is وَلِہَ which means to become astounded; to become astonished; to become mesmerized. Based on these meanings of the word الہ we all have numerous الہ in our lives. We personify and objectify these definitions in numerous ways.

title: Idols
text: People and things that meet the definition of the word الہ give a physical forms to one of the definitions of the word An idol is an image or representation of a god used as an object of worship. Idols are man made creations We objectify and personify the definitions of الہ We are surrounded by thousands of الہ which are self-created idols, and we worship them on a daily b In that sense, we are all "idol-worshipers" قال رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ و آلہ و سلم الشِّرکُ فِی أُمَّتِی أَخفٰی مِن سَیرِ النَّمَلِ فِی لَیلَۃِ الظُّلمَۃِ عَلی سَخْرَۃِ السَّوْدَا SHIRK (Associating partnership with Allah) is more hidden in my nation, than the movement of a black ant in a dark night on a black stone. The Criterion [25:43] [ سورۃ ۲۵] الفرقان ‏أَرَءَيْتَ مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَهَهُۥ هَوَىٰهُ أَفَأَنتَ تَكُونُ عَلَيْهِ وَكِيلًا ‎ ۴۳ Have you seen the one who takes as his god his own desire? Then would you be responsible for him?

title: Humility
text: Another benefit is that it engenders humility before God. It encourages us to call upon Allah through prayers. Allah says: Jonas [10:12] [ سورۃ ۱۰] یونس ‏وَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلْإِنسَنَ ٱلضُّرُّ دَعَانَا لِجَنۢبِهِۦٓ أَوْ قَاعِدًا أَوْ قَآئِمًۭا ۱۲ When the harm afflicts a person, he calls on us, lying on his side, sitting or standing. Calamities last for a short while If we simply relax we will get through any tribulation Disbelievers are drowning because they are in a state of panic. Calamities also breaks down pride and arrogance Wealth is a greater calamity than poverty

title: Forbearance
text: Calamities train us in forbearance. When we ask Allah for qualities, he provides us the opportunity to develop those characteristics through calamities. الحِلم عَن مَّنْ صَبَرَۃْ عَنہُ المصیبۃ Forbearance in the face of an affliction. أِن فیک خَصُلَتَینِ یُحِبُّھُم اللہُ : الحلمُ و الأِناہُ You have two qualities that Allah loves the most: forbearance and deliberation

title: Patience
text: Calamity teaches us to be patient The Cow [2:153] [ سورۃ ۲] البقرۃ ‏يَٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا۟ ٱسْتَعِينُوا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَٱلصَّلَوٰةِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَعَ ٱلصَّبِرِينَ ‎ ۱۵۳ O believers, Seek assistance of Allah through patience and prayer - Indeed Allah is with the patient ones. انتظار الفَرَج To wait for an opening from Allah is one of the greatest acts of عبادۃ - to just wait for an opening from Allah. If you complain, you're not being patient. That is the quality of a donkey, who brays when loaded with weight The purpose of patience is To engender the love of Allah - الصَّبرُ مُوجِبُ محبۃَ اللہ تعالی و کثرۃَ ثوابہ Seek a great reward for the patience. The Cow [2:155-156] [ سورۃ ۲] البقرۃ ‏وَلَنَبْلُوَنَّكُم بِشَىْءٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْخَوْفِ وَٱلْجُوعِ وَنَقْصٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْأَمْوَلِ وَٱلْأَنفُسِ وَٱلثَّمَرَتِ ۗ وَبَشِّرِ ٱلصَّبِرِينَ ‎ ۱۵۵ ‏ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَآ أَصَبَتْهُم مُّصِيبَةٌۭ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّآ إِلَيْهِ رَجِعُونَ ‎ ۱۵۶ ( 155 ) And We will surely test you with something of fear and hunger and a loss of wealth and lives and fruits, but give good tidings to the patient, ( 156 ) Who, when disaster strikes them, say, "Indeed we belong to Allah, and indeed to Him we will return." The Troops [39:10] [ سورۃ ۳۹] الزمر ‏قُلْ يَعِبَادِ ٱلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ ۚ لِلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ فِى هَذِهِ ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةٌۭ ۗ وَأَرْضُ ٱللَّهِ وَسِعَةٌ ۗ إِنَّمَا يُوَفَّى ٱلصَّبِرُونَ أَجْرَهُم بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍۢ ‎ ۱۰ Say :"O My slaves who believe, be afraid of your Lord and keep your duty to Him. Good is for those who do good in this world, and Allah's earth is spacious !! Only those who are patient shall receive their rewards in full, without reckoning." Three stages of patience Ordinary people ( عوام الناس ) They endure calamity with difficulty The Elite ( خواص ) They endure calamity with pleasure The Elite of the Elite ( خاص الخواص ) They have the complete power to remove the calamity and yet they endure it with contentment

title: Gratitude
text: Calamities increase us in gratitude, because we finally realize the worth of عافیۃ - safety and comfort We take blessings for granted The grateful recognize the benefits within calamities As a sick person is grateful to the doctor who is severing one of his limbs because it has gangrene in it He realizes there is a benefit in the doctor's action

title: Experiencing Joy For the
text: The prophet (Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam) said أِنْ کانَ لِیَفْرَحُونَ بالبَلآءِ کما تَفرَحُونَ بالرَّخَاءِ People who went before, they used to be as happy during times of calamities and tribulations, as you are during times of abundance Some friends of Allah have been preparing for a calamity to demonstrate their patience and forbearance. حبَّبَ المَکْرُوھان: الموت و الفَقَر How wondrous are these two distasteful things: death and poverty. Maulana Ali (AS) said about wealth. حلالُہُ حساب و حرامُہُ عِقاب What's halal from it is a reckoning and what is prohibited from it is a punishment وأنَّما فَرِحُو بِھا أِذْ لا لِشَدَّتِھا و مَرارَتِھا، بَل بِنِسبَتِ الی ثَمرَتِھا وَ فاَئِدَتِھا That they were happy with those calamities, not because they happened; but rather because of the rewards and the fruits that came from those tribulations. The patient man's happiness is similar to the one who is afflicted with a great disease, but has been given a bitter cure.

title: Wisdom
text: Allah says in سورۃ لقمان : Luqman [31:12] [ سورۃ ۳۱] لقمان ‏وَلَقَدْ آتَيْنَا لُقْمَنَ ٱلْحِكْمَةَ أَنِ ٱشْكُرْ لِلَّهِ ۚ وَمَن يَشْكُرْ فَإِنَّمَا يَشْكُرُ لِنَفْسِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن كَفَرَ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَنِىٌّ حَمِيدٌۭ ‎ ۱۲ And indeed We bestowed upon Luqman wisdom - "Be grateful to Allah," and whoever is grateful, he is grateful for his own self. And whoever is ungrateful, then indeed Allah is self-sufficient and Worthy of all praise. Hazrat Luqman was offered a choice between wisdom and prohet-hood in a dream and he chose wisdom Wisdom requires a pure heart and a sound intellect ( لب ) You are wise when you have correct knowledge. and you act upon it. The ultimate goal of the Quran and the teachings of Rasul Allah(Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam) is wisdom

title: Why did Iblis ask for reprieve?
text: Iblis said: قَالَ فَبِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأَقْعُدَنَّ لَهُمْ صِرَطَكَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ Iblis blames Allah (Subhanhu Wa Ta'ala) for his disobedience. His words display a complete lack of responsibility. Unfortunately we act in the exact same manner all the time We present logical justifications and rationalizations for our failures لَأَقْعُدَنَّ لَهُمْ صِرَطَكَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ The word قعد means to sit. But قعد with a لام as used in this verse لَأَقْعُدَ means to sit somewhere, with the intent of ambushing someone. Horizontal Plane ثُمَّ لَآتِيَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ وَعَنْ أَيْمَنِهِمْ وَعَن شَمَآئِلِهِمْ ۖ وَلَا تَجِدُ أَكْثَرَهُمْ شَكِرِينَ What we have in front of us is the straight path leading to جنۃ . Iblis will detour us from it From behind means he will pull us back when we're making progress From the right means if we're in good company doing good things he'll attack by discouraging us. From the left means if we're in bad company doing bad things, he will still attack us by encouraging us to do more evil. وَلَا تَجِدُ أَكْثَرَهُمْ شَكِرِينَ He tells Allah that I'll show you that these humans that you chose to honor with your خلافۃ instead of me were not worthy of that honor Vertical Plane Iblis leaves out two direction - top and bottom What comes from above is revelation What happens below is سجدۃ As long as we are connected with Allah through his revelation; and as long as we are in a state of submission to the message contained in Allah's revelation - Iblis will not have access to us. Iblis has no access to us in the vertical plane of آخرۃ . He only has access to us in the horizontal plane of دنیا

title: How Quran relates to human beings
text: The word انسان comes from two root words. The first root is أُنس which means closeness. Human beings have been created with a need for closeness The second root is نَسِی which means to forget. Human beings forgot who they were supposed to be close to. What does a forgetful person constantly need? Reminders! We as human beings constantly operate based on reminders Allah calls the Quran الذکر which means reminder Allah sent انسان (the one who forgets) a reminder ( ذکر الحکیم ).

title: Signs
text: We are reminded through signs. The Arabic word for sign is آیۃ The word آیۃ comes from the root word أَی which means Something valuable and precious Something that has meaning and purpose Something that can be used as evidence A distinct sign that clearly separates one thing from another Allah created man ( انسان ) who forgets who he is supposed to be close to. He sent him a reminder and الذکرالحکیم - a wise reminder that is made up of آیات The signs ( آیات ) of the Quran point to the signs ( آیات ) that Allah(Subhanahu wa Ta'ala) created for us in the horizons and within ourselves. Fusilat [41:53] [ سورۃ ۴۱] فصلت ‏سَنُرِيهِمْ آيَتِنَا فِى ٱلأٓفَاقِ وَفِىٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ حَتَّىٰ يَتَبَيَّنَ لَهُمْ أَنَّهُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۗ ‎ ۵۳ We will show them Our Signs in the universe, and in their own selves, until it becomes manifest to them that this is the truth.

title: Creation Of Adam
text: According to Quran, the infamous career of ابلیس begins with the creation of Adam AS. The Cow [2:30] [ سورۃ ۲] البقرۃ ‏وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى جَاعِلٌۭ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ خَلِيفَةًۭ ۖ قَالُوٓا۟ أَتَجْعَلُ فِيهَا مَن يُفْسِدُ فِيهَا وَيَسْفِكُ ٱلدِّمَآءَ وَنَحْنُ نُسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِكَ وَنُقَدِّسُ لَكَ ۖ قَالَ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَمُ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ ‎ ۳۰ And when your Lord said to the angels: "Verily, I am going to place generations after generations on earth." They said: "Will You place therein those who will make mischief therein and shed blood, - while we glorify You with praises and thanks and sanctify You." He said: "I know that which you do not know." The Cow [2:31] [ سورۃ ۲] البقرۃ ‏وَعَلَّمَ آدَمَ ٱلْأَسْمَآءَ كُلَّهَا ثُمَّ عَرَضَهُمْ عَلَى ٱلْمَلَٓئِكَةِ فَقَالَ أَنۢبِـُٔونِى بِأَسْمَآءِ هَٓؤُلَآءِ إِن كُنتُمْ صَدِقِينَ ‎ ۳۱ And He taught Adam all the names , then He showed them to the angels and said, "Tell Me the names of these if you are truthful." Allah granted Adam the knowledge of names - أسمآء . which is the ability of symbolic thought. The word اسم in Arabic means a name, as well as noun. Noun is a word that is used to identify people, places, ideas, or things. Every noun has a name in order to be addressed in symbolic thought. This is a capability only humans possess Allah forbids us to create examples and likes for him - because لیس کمثلہ شئی There is nothing (no thing) that can be used as an example to understand him. The Cow [2:32] [ سورۃ ۲] البقرۃ ‏قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَنَكَ لَا عِلْمَ لَنَآ إِلَّا مَا عَلَّمْتَنَآ ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ‎ ۳۲ They said: "Glory be to You, we have no knowledge except what you have taught us. Verily, it is You, the All-Knower, the All-Wise." The Cow [2:33] [ سورۃ ۲] البقرۃ ‏قَالَ يَٓـَٔادَمُ أَنۢبِئْهُم بِأَسْمَآئِهِمْ ۖ فَلَمَّآ أَنۢبَأَهُم بِأَسْمَآئِهِمْ قَالَ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَمُ غَيْبَ ٱلسَّمَوَتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَأَعْلَمُ مَا تُبْدُونَ وَمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْتُمُونَ ‎ ۳۳ He said: "O Adam! Inform them of their names," and when he had informed them of their names, He said: "Did I not tell you that I know the Ghaib in the heavens and the earth, and I know what you reveal and what you have been concealing?" The Cow [2:34] [ سورۃ ۲] البقرۃ ‏وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلَٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِآدَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكَفِرِينَ ‎ ۳۴ And when We said to the angels: "Prostrate yourselves before Adam.". And they prostrated except Iblîs , he refused and was proud and was one of the disbelievers.

title: Rewards
text: A manifestation of رحمۃ occurs in the form of his infinite rewards for trivial acts. Rasul Allah(Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam) stated the reward of اعتکاف in a HADEES. He said: من اعتكف يوماً ابتغاء وجه الله باعد الله بينه وبين النار ثلاثة خنادق كل خندق كما بين الخافقين Whoever stays in the state of اعتکاف for one day - just one day, Allah(Subhanahu wa Ta'ala) will distance him from hell-fire by 3 trenches - each trench will be of the distance between the east and west Story of ابن عباس رضی اللہ تعالی عنہ the cousin of the prophet breaking his اعتکاف The prophet (Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam) said: if one of you was to strive for the need of his Muslim brother, Allah(Subhanahu wa Ta'ala) rewards him with the blessings of 10 years of اعتکاف . Rewards are a manifestation of the love Allah has for us that he's willing to shower us with his blessings for the most trivial acts of kindness. He'll give us the reward of 10, 20 Hajj for a couple of hours of worship. You can do it for the reward, or you can do it in appreciation of that divine love.

title: Responding In Afflictions
text: In a HADEES in which Rasul Allah(Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam) tells us that when you visit a sick person, ask him to pray for you and your forgiveness. Imagine your child falls very ill (God Forbid), to the point where she needs to be put on a ventilator. How would you feel in that moment towards her? When she finally wakes up, how would you respond to the following questions? May I have ice cream? Will you forgive me? Will you forgive my brother? How would Allah respond to the call of his creation in pain?

title: Disbelief Of Iblis Was His Disobedience
text: We believe in Allah as our creator, and yet we still disobey him all the time We then rationalize our disobedience Iblis doesn't need to get us to disbelieve - all he needs to do is get us to disobey. Through his disobedience, Iblis intentionally rejected and covered up the truth, and transgressed the boundaries of his agreement with Allah(Subhanahu wa Ta'ala). The Arabic word for an agreement is عھد . We have made a promise to Allah: To obey him To pray 5 times a day To fast To give زکواۃ To do good and refrain from evil. The root cause of all disobedience is arrogance. Allah says in a حدیث قدسی : الکبر ردائی و العظمۃ ازاری فمن نازعني واحداً منهما قد فته في النار Pride is my cloak and greatness is my trouser and whoever snatches either one from me, I will throw him in the hellfire. We will make mistakes because we're human. The word آدم is derived from the word دم which means blood The nature of blood is that it constantly needs to be oxygenated through the heart What sets us apart from Iblis is our humility. Repentance is the path of a true believer when he disobeys Allah. Arrogance, justifying and rationalizing disobedience is the path of Iblis.

title: Fire Vs Clay
text: Iblis believed himself to be superior to Adam based on the material he was created with This was the first act of racism Allah in response called him a صاغر فَٱخْرُجْ إِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلصَّغِرِينَ Allah pointed out to him that clay is in fact better than fire The word طین means damp mud, or damp dirt. It is commonly translated as clay Even though the external aspects of fire may seem superior to that of clay, if we analyze their internal states, we will find clay is far superior to fire. The first, and the most important reason is because clay is humble, and therefore allows for growth within it. Fire completely rejects water and there can be no growth, no development of life through fire. Clay is obedient and submits itself into the hands of the potter, who then shapes it in any way he feels is best. Fire on the other hand cannot be molded or shaped, because it is disobedient and arrogant. The Arabic word for a burning flame is شرارۃ , which comes from the root word شر which means "evil". Fire even though bright, luminous and attractive, destroys and leaves things disfigured. Sin works the exact same way. Farmer does not see the fruit of his labor until harvest season. A believer does not see the fruits of his hard work until the moment of his death. This دنیا is fire for the one who wants immediate rewards; and it is clay for the one who is willing to defer his enjoyment and pleasures for a incomparably greater reward

title: Deception Of Iblis Through Logic
text: Continuing these verses from سورۃ الاعراف , Allah says: The Heights [7:20] [ سورۃ ۷] الاعراف ‏فَوَسْوَسَ لَهُمَا ٱلشَّيْطَنُ لِيُبْدِىَ لَهُمَا مَا وُۥرِىَ عَنْهُمَا مِن سَوْءَتِهِمَا وَقَالَ مَا نَهَىٰكُمَا رَبُّكُمَا عَنْ هَذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةِ إِلَّآ أَن تَكُونَا مَلَكَيْنِ أَوْ تَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلْخَلِدِينَ ‎ ۲۰ Then Shaitan whispered suggestions to them both in order to uncover that which was hidden from them of their private parts; he said: "Your Lord did not forbid you this tree save you should become angels or become of the immortals." Iblis said to them: the only reason Allah has prevented you from approaching this tree, is because if you did so, two things could happen: Either you both will turn into angels Or you will become people who live in the paradise forever. The only reason Allah is forbidding you from the tree is because he doesn't want you to turn into angels, nor does he want you to live in paradise forever Allah created Adam for representation on earth, not for paradise Angels and Jinn knew Allah's intention for creation of Adam but he did not When Allah opened up the doors of paradise for Adam and Hawwa, he said: وَقُلْنَا يَٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسْكُنْ أَنتَ وَزَوْجُكَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ - Allah said: Settle here - which is a momentary or temporary stop Iblis approached them with logic of survival. He nourished their dormant desire for a permanent residence in جنۃ The Heights [7:21] [ سورۃ ۷] الاعراف ‏وَقَاسَمَهُمَآ إِنِّى لَكُمَا لَمِنَ ٱلنَّصِحِينَ ‎ ۲۱ And he swore by Allah to them both :"Verily, I am one of the sincere well­wisher for you both." In بلاغۃ when one you say أِنی , it's called مُترَدِّد . It is used when speaking to someone who is doubting you. However when a لام is used after أِنی , as it is used here, إِنِّى لَكُمَا لَمِنَ ٱلنَّصِحِينَ . This form of speech is for someone who does not believe you at all Adam and Hawwa had no concept of lies

title: What Is Rab?
text: The linguistic meaning of the word رب is a combination of 6 attributes: المالک والسَّیِّد و المُرَبِّی والمُرشَد وَالمُنعِم والقَیِّم Absolute Ownership Complete Authority One who nurtures One who guides and sets to purpose Gracious benefactor Sustainer This is why the man reflecting on the creations of the heavens and earth called him رب in his supplication رَبَّنَا مَا خَلَقْتَ هَذَا بَطِلًۭا رَبَّنَآ إِنَّكَ مَن تُدْخِلِ ٱلنَّارَ فَقَدْ أَخْزَيْتَهُۥ رَّبَّنَآ إِنَّنَا سَمِعْنَا مُنَادِيًۭا يُنَادِى لِلْإِيمَنِ أَنْ آمِنُوا۟ بِرَبِّكُمْ فَـَٔامَنَّا All creation is constantly manifesting the ربوبیۃ of its creator. The Children of Israel [17:44] [ سورۃ ۱۷] الاسرا ‏تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ ٱلسَّمَوَتُ ٱلسَّبْعُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَن فِيهِنَّ ۚ وَإِن مِّن شَىْءٍ إِلَّا يُسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِهِۦ وَلَكِن لَّا تَفْقَهُونَ تَسْبِيحَهُمْ ۗ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ حَلِيمًا غَفُورًۭا ‎ ۴۴ The seven heavens and the earth and all that is therein, glorify Him and there is not a thing but glorifies His Praise. But you understand not their glorification. Truly, He is Ever Forbearing, Oft-Forgiving. Linguists agree that a more suitable one word replacement for رب is master rather than lord

title: A Beautiful Relationship
text: The word رب implies a relationship and needs a counterpart. Teachers have relationship with students Parents imply relationship with children Certain names of Allah do not imply a personal relationship. For example. Allah is الأعلی . He is lofty! But other attributes do imply a personal relationship. Allah begins his revelation, introducing himself as رب when he says اقرأ بسم ربک الذی خلق . He is essentially highlighting the most important relationship that matters most to him. We have to accept ourselves as slaves ( عبد ) to complete the relationship

title: Why is Iblis so angry with Adam?
text: Iblis is mad at Adam because he got into trouble with Allah because of Adam AS. He lost his standing with Allah because of this human species. He believes he would have retained his elevated status with Allah forever if it wasn't for Adam Iblis's Request Grant me the power to dominate these human beings through their desires. For every son that Adam has grant me two, so that I have twice the power over them. Allow me to make a home in the hearts of the children of Adam. Allow my toxic influences to flow through their lives, like blood flows through their veins. Allow me to attack them with my ground forces as well as my air forces Allow me to mix and mingle into their wealth, and to confuse them with false hopes and vain promises. Allah empowering Adam I will assign a protector (conscience) to every single one of your children. Their sole job will be to protect them against the attacks of Iblis. For every good deed they do I will record it as 10 good deeds; and for sin they commit, I'll record it only once. If if they repent on that sin before the end of the day, I will completely erase it from their records. Go Tell you children to never despair in the mercy of their master. My mercy will always accompany them no matter how disobedient they are! Go tell them I will never close the door of repentance upon them. Till their very last breadth they will have the opportunity to repent and seek my forgiveness and when they do, I will forgive them. Go tell your children that no matter how many times they repent and seek my forgiveness, I will keep on forgiving them over and over again; and I will not even maintain an account of how many times I've forgiven them for that very same sin. So after accepting the challenge of Iblis, Allah said: قَالَ ٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا مَذْءُومًۭا مَّدْحُورًۭا Allah says get out of my paradise, with disgrace and as someone who has been expelled. لَّمَن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ Whoever follows you among them, I will fill hellfire with all of you together Wait. What?! Fill hellfire with all of you?! Where did that come from? I thought Allah was talking about Iblis and his army. He should have said. I will fill hellfire with them! But he didn't say: منھم اجمعین . He said. منکم اجمعین . He says all of you ! This is actually لی الطوقیۃ to scare you, to scare me - This is لی التحدید to challenge us. It is to challenge the one reading the Quran. We come upon this verse and we're like, Wait! Where did the mention of you come from? I thought Allah would say I will fill hell fire with them. No! He says I will fill hellfire with you! I'm reading the book and all of a sudden this verse is now pointing at me! The purpose is to awaken us! To startle us! Wait ME???? OMG I better not follow Iblis! Because the only way its pointing at me, is if I follow Iblis. So this switch in subject - this التفات is actually a means of warning and terrifying us. And its used all over the place in Quran.

title: Companion
text: The word صاحب could be used in the most casual sense or for someone you spend a lifetime with One of the names of Rasul Allah(Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam) in the Quran is صاحب : The Overthrowing [81:22] [ سورۃ ۸۱] التکویر ‏وَمَا صَاحِبُكُم بِمَجْنُونٍۢ ‎ ۲۲ And your companion is not a madman; A صاحب will always want the best for you. This friendship comes with a social responsibility

title: Trustworthy Friend
text: The word ولیجۃ comes from the verb وَلَجَ، یَلِجُو in Arabic means to penetrate deeply. Allah says يَعْلَمُ مَا يَلِجُ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا Allah knows what's goes into the earth and what comes out of it. A ولیجۃ is a friend who knows all about what is going on in your life They are very deeply involved in your affairs. You trust them to the point that you share anything and everything with them. Allah uses this level of friendship with 3 specific entities أَمْ حَسِبْتُمْ أَن تُتْرَكُوا۟ Do you think that you shall be left alone وَلَمَّا يَعْلَمِ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ جَهَدُوا۟ مِنكُمْ while Allah has not yet tested those among you who have striven hard and fought وَلَمْ يَتَّخِذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَلَا رَسُولِهِۦ وَلَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَلِيجَةًۭ ۚ and have not taken ولیجۃ besides Allah and His Messenger, and the believers

title: Confidant
text: The word بِطانۃ comes from بطن which means stomach. A بِطانۃ is a friend who keeps your secrets. The Family of Imran [3:118] [ سورۃ ۳] آل عمران ‏يَٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا۟ لَا تَتَّخِذُوا۟ بِطَانَةًۭ مِّن دُونِكُمْ لَا يَأْلُونَكُمْ خَبَالًۭا وَدُّوا۟ مَا عَنِتُّمْ قَدْ بَدَتِ ٱلْبَغْضَآءُ مِنْ أَفْوَهِهِمْ وَمَا تُخْفِى صُدُورُهُمْ أَكْبَرُ ۚ قَدْ بَيَّنَّا لَكُمُ ٱلْآيَتِ ۖ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ ‎ ۱۱۸ O you who believe! Take not as Bitanah those outside your religion since they will not fail to do their best to corrupt you. They desire to harm you severely. Hatred has already appeared from their mouths, but what their breasts conceal is far worse. Indeed We have made plain to you the signs if you understand.

title: Conclusion
text: First Perfection Allah created the human being his own image. فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى So when I fashioned ADAM completely and breathed into him the spirit that I had created. نفخ means to blow with force, which means our spirit was literally blown or breathed into us This روح accepted اسلام (submission) by submitting itself to its master through its primordial testimony. It possesses all the angelic qualities in its child-like behavior. This RUH is the state of "first perfection", that contains within it all the qualities of a true believer in potential form. Second Perfection The child matures into an adult and gains a sense of individuality and responsibility. He gains control of his intellect which is the primary component of human existence. شریعۃ is not applicable without the intellect. It does not apply to 3 types of people A child An insane person A person who is asleep until he wakes up Quran speaks to the intellect - It's job is to restrain emotions, desires and will, and to navigate the heart through the intellect It provides the heart with the direction it needs reach its final destination. The heart, in turn commands the نفس to do good and refrain from evil; and the نفس then executes those command through the body.

title: Hierarchy between components
text: Intellect cannot gain a direct understanding of the spirit because it has a lower place in the hierarchy of spiritual components If the intellect has no ability to understand the spirit to which it belongs, how could it possibly gain an understanding of Allah(Subhanahu wa Ta'ala) who is the creator of the spirit and intellect? Allah created human beings based on his own فطرۃ , which is the natural disposition ingrained within the spirit روح فِطْرَتَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّتِى فَطَرَ ٱلنَّاسَ عَلَيْهَا Allah's nature is that, on which he created the nature of mankind فطرۃ is the dormant seed that can only be activated through the practices of شریعۃ Responsibility is the "ability to respond" to the call of our فطرۃ

title: Acts Of Gratitude
text: Luqman explains the acts of gratitude Luqman [31:17-19] [ سورۃ ۳۱] لقمان ‏يَبُنَىَّ أَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَأْمُرْ بِٱلْمَعْرُوفِ وَٱنْهَ عَنِ ٱلْمُنكَرِ وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَآ أَصَابَكَ ۖ إِنَّ ذَلِكَ مِنْ عَزْمِ ٱلْأُمُورِ ‎ ۱۷ O my son, establish prayer, enjoin what is right, forbid what is wrong, and be patient over what befalls you. Indeed, [all] that is of the matters [requiring] determination. ‏وَلَا تُصَعِّرْ خَدَّكَ لِلنَّاسِ وَلَا تَمْشِ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍۢ فَخُورٍۢ ‎ ۱۸ And do not turn your cheek [in contempt] toward people and do not walk through the earth exultantly. Indeed, Allah does not like everyone self-deluded and boastful. ‏وَٱقْصِدْ فِى مَشْيِكَ وَٱغْضُضْ مِن صَوْتِكَ ۚ إِنَّ أَنكَرَ ٱلْأَصْوَتِ لَصَوْتُ ٱلْحَمِيرِ ‎ ۱۹ And be moderate in your pace and lower your voice; indeed, the most disagreeable of sounds is the voice of donkeys."

title: Symptoms Of Sin
text: Calamities puts us in a state of ھم and غم ; anxiety and depression. Fear of loss is ھم (anxiety) Losing what you feared causes غم (depression). Anxiety and depression happen because of sins Pain are indicators that something is wrong Physical pain indicating something is wrong with the body Anxiety and depression indicates something is wrong with the soul Tribulations are a result of ones own sins Counsel [42:30] [ سورۃ ۴۲] الشوری ‏وَمَآ أَصَبَكُم مِّن مُّصِيبَةٍۢ فَبِمَا كَسَبَتْ أَيْدِيكُمْ وَيَعْفُوا۟ عَن كَثِيرٍۢ ‎ ۳۰ And whatever of misfortune befalls you, it is because of what your hands have earned. And He pardons much. The suffering is much than what we deserve. Calamity is: Punishment for the disbeliever help the disbelievers select the correct target Blessing for the believer to fix his aim

title: Conclusion
text: The purpose is not be "perfect". The goal is not to become Allah, rather become like Allah. Many things interfere with our aim. Gravity, wind speed and direction, distance, moisture in the air Those are the worldly distractions The goal is to account for all these factors when aiming for Allah The Cow [2:45] [ سورۃ ۲] البقرۃ ‏وَٱسْتَعِينُوا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَٱلصَّلَوٰةِ ‎ ۴۵ And seek help through patience and prayer,

title: People Have Ranks With Allah
text: The رُتُب are the ranks that people have in relation to Allah. وَمَا يَعْلَمُ جُنُودَ رَبِّكَ إِلَّا هُوَ In the world people wear uniform to let others know their rank. Allah has hidden ranks of people Maulana Ali (AS) said that Allah hid three things within three things. أخْفَا رضائُہُ فی طاعَتِہِ Allah hid his contentment in His obedience وأخْفَا سَخَتَہُ فی مَعصِیَتِہِ and he hid his wrath in his disobedience. وأخْفَا أَوْلیائُہ فی عِبَادِہ He he hid his friends, among his servants

title: Spiritual Training
text: We're constantly testing relationships and friendships to test sincerity The real prize is sincerity. Believers claim to love Allah by saying لا الہ الا اللہ . There is no god but Allah. The test begin with simple things such as five daily prayers, fasting, helping others through زکوۃ , Whenever we struggle with Allah's injunctions place yourself in his shoes All prophets went through tribulation - not to remove sins, but to elevate them in rank. For them it becomes ارتفاع الدرجات - They are moving up in ranks.

title: Distinction
text: A formula that اولیاء اللہ have given us to understand the reason for calamity is as follows: For a believer: If the tribulation is causing anxiety and depression, it is for the removal of our sins If we find ourselves content with the decree of Allah, then it is for the elevation of our ranks For Disbelievers: Calamities are punishments

title: Story Of Taif
text: To You, my Lord, I complain of my weakness, lack of support and the humiliation I am made to receive. Most Compassionate and Merciful! You are the Lord of the weak, and you are my Lord. To whom do You leave me? To a distant person who receives me with hostility? Or to an enemy You have given power over me? As long as you are not displeased with me, I do not care what I face. I would, however, be much happier with Your mercy. I seek refuge in the light of Your face by which all darkness is dispelled and both this life and the life to come are put in their right course against incurring your wrath or being the subject of your anger. To You I submit, until I earn Your pleasure. Everything is powerless without your support.

title: Reminder Of Lordship
text: Another benefit of tribulation is that it helps us realize the power of Allah's Lordship and mastery over us. Allah is رب - and we are مربوب and It is the nature of Lordship to Lord over us; There is no strategy or strength except through Allah لا حول ولا قوۃ الا باللہ العلی العظیم . Tribulations are a mechanism to remind believers that we are not in control. We are deluded in thinking we are free , independent , and that we can do whatever we want.

title: Servitude
text: We realize our abject servitude before Allah - معرفۃ ذِلّۃ العبودیۃ و کَثْرِھا our complete state of resignation and brokenness before the will and power of Allah(Subhanahu wa Ta'ala) The Cow [2:156] [ سورۃ ۲] البقرۃ ‏ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَآ أَصَبَتْهُم مُّصِيبَةٌۭ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّآ إِلَيْهِ رَجِعُونَ ‎ ۱۵۶ Who, when disaster strikes them, say, "Indeed we belong to Allah, and indeed to Him we will return." We are in the dominion of Allah. إِنَّا لِلَّهِ We belong to Allah We and this دنیا are the property of Allah, and he can do whatever he pleases with it. Our free will and ego gets in the way of our submission Our suffering suffering is not in the calamity, but not knowing Allah's reasons behind the calamity. The difference between us believers, and the disbelievers, is that we're willing to wait until the day of judgment to learn Allah's reasons. Allah says: وَمَآ أُوتِيتُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ إِلَّا قَلِيلًۭا - You have not been given from my knowledge, except for a very small amount.

title: Sincerity
text: Another benefit of calamities is اخلاصُ للہ تعالی - it develops sincerity to Allah. Calamities create an environment that makes us realize that we have no way out, and no defense against calamities, except through Allah That forces us to develop اخلاصُ . Story of finding sincerity in رسائل اخوان الصفی Calamities make our worship and supplications sincere. The goal is to carry the lessons learnt from calamities and apply them during our time of ease.

title: Removing Distractions
text: We return to Allah(Subhanahu wa Ta'ala) and we become fervent in the desire for our master. الأنابۃ اللہ تعالی والأِقبالُ علیہ The Romans [30:33] [ سورۃ ۳۰] الروم ‏وَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلنَّاسَ ضُرٌّۭ دَعَوْا۟ رَبَّهُم مُّنِيبِينَ إِلَيْهِ ‎ ۳۳ When a harm afflicts the human being he calls upon his master returning back to Him We easily get distracted from our purpose because of Allah's blessings We enjoy the blessings and forget the one who gave it to us Allah takes away his blessings to remove our distractions, so that we can focus and fulfill the purpose of our creation.

title: Level 2 Of Quranic Understanding - TAFAKKUR
text: Reflection (تفکر) This is the level at which intellectuals operate The Family of Imran [3:190-191] [ سورۃ ۳] آل عمران ‏إِنَّ فِى خَلْقِ ٱلسَّمَوَتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱخْتِلَفِ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ لَآيَتٍۢ لِّأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبَبِ ‎ ۱۹۰ Verily! In the creation of the heavens and the earth, and in the alternation of night and day, there are indeed signs for men of understanding. ‏ٱلَّذِينَ يَذْكُرُونَ ٱللَّهَ قِيَمًۭا وَقُعُودًۭا وَعَلَىٰ جُنُوبِهِمْ وَيَتَفَكَّرُونَ فِى خَلْقِ ٱلسَّمَوَتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ رَبَّنَا مَا خَلَقْتَ هَذَا بَطِلًۭا سُبْحَنَكَ فَقِنَا عَذَابَ ٱلنَّارِ ‎ ۱۹۱ Those who remember Allah standing, sitting, and lying down on their sides, and think deeply about the creation of the heavens and the earth, :"Our Lord! You have not created this without purpose, glory to You!. Give us salvation from the torment of the Fire. Reflection comes from the Latin word "re-flectare", which means to bend back, or to throw back. قال رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ و سلم قال رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ و سلماِنَّا اللہ اَسَّسَ دِینَہُ عَلیَ مِثاَلِ خَلقِہِ لِیَستَدِلَّ بِالدِّینِ عَلَی الدُّنیَا ؛ وَ الدُّنیَا عَلَی الدِّین Indeed Allah founded his religion on the pattern of creation, to provide evidence for his religion through the world; and to provide evidence for the world through his religion. Allah created this universe on the exact same pattern of his spiritual realm. A child begins its process of education by learning to put together signs and symbols of the alphabets Quran then asks us to do the exact same thing. Both words فکر and کفر are made from the same letters Quran cannot be learnt without a teacher One must have a clear understanding of Arabic language Grammar Expressions and Metaphors

title: Level 2 Of Quranic Understanding - TADABBUR
text: Taking It To The End (تدبر) The word تدبر comes from the root word دبر which means the buttocks. تدبر means to get to the end of something; to take something to its very end; to completely exhaust something. The word مدبر also comes from the same root, which means administrator, because an administrator has complete control over something - from its beginning to its very end. In terms of تدبر of Quran, there is no end to it. Quran is an endless ocean - it is boundless and limitless. Speech and an attribute of the speaker Rasul Allah(Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam) was the only one who was given complete knowledge of this book. That knowledge was then transferred to his successor, مولانا علی ابن ابی طالب علیہ السلام . It is then transferred to the true Imam of each time who comes from the progeny of Maulana Ali and Maulatina Fatima - and revealed to us through the hierarchy of religion in the form of higher realms of knowledge.

title: Martian And The Ipad
text: Some of the conclusions the Martian can draw about human beings by examining an iPad There is clear design based on the systematic placement of various components Human beings have the ability to see They have the ability to hear They have fingers for operating a keyboard They are capable of movement They think using binary logically Why did human beings create this device? This question can only be answered by a human being We are the martians who must study this universe (iPad) that was designed and created by Allah(Subhanahu wa Ta'ala) in order for us to get to know him.

title: Reflection On Heaven And Earth
text: Allah says in the beautiful verses of سورۃ آل عمران , in which Allah describes these people of reflection. The Family of Imran [3:190] [ سورۃ ۳] آل عمران ‏إِنَّ فِى خَلْقِ ٱلسَّمَوَتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱخْتِلَفِ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ لَآيَتٍۢ لِّأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبَبِ ‎ ۱۹۰ Indeed! In the creation of the heavens and the earth, and in the conflict of night and day, there are indeed signs for men of understanding. Pure Essence اولی الاباب is commonly translated as "people of sound intellects", but what's more true in meaning, is people of sound essence . The word الباب is the plural form of لُب which in classical Arabic means the kernel inside a nut, or the seed inside a fruit. It represents the essence because seed is the essence of the fruit. It contains the entire tree within itself in a passive form. It shell protects the kernel from all external harmful influences because of which it's essence always remains pure. People of pure essence are people who can truly appreciate the value of these cosmological signs. The Family of Imran [3:191] [ سورۃ ۳] آل عمران ‏ٱلَّذِينَ يَذْكُرُونَ ٱللَّهَ قِيَمًۭا وَقُعُودًۭا وَعَلَىٰ جُنُوبِهِمْ وَيَتَفَكَّرُونَ فِى خَلْقِ ٱلسَّمَوَتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ رَبَّنَا مَا خَلَقْتَ هَذَا بَطِلًۭا سُبْحَنَكَ فَقِنَا عَذَابَ ٱلنَّارِ ‎ ۱۹۱ Those who remember Allah standing, sitting, and lying down on their sides, and think deeply about the creation of the heavens and the earth, :"Our Lord! You have not created this without purpose, glory to You!. Give us salvation from the torment of the Fire. Reflections on external Signs The universe is massive composed of gigantic stars and planets that are delicately connected with each other Sun is the star that directly affects my life in this world Despite its power it is in complete submission and bound by the forces of gravity Importance of night and day I am not a creation that is independent of other creations. Human beings are the only one benefiting from all physical creations, which leads me to the conclusion of: رَبَّنَا مَا خَلَقْتَ هَذَا بَطِلًۭا Master you did not create this universe in vain. You did not create me in vain Creator is too exalted to create something without a purpose - سُبْحَنَكَ Why would this creator do so much for me? Has to be love! How can I express my gratitude to this creator? But fulfilling my purpose of creation Reflections On Internal Signs My body is made up of multiple internal and external organs that have been very systematically placed. Soul is the sky and the body is its earth. Body is in complete submission to the soul I have a constant conflict of good and evil inside my soul. The only possible and logical conclusion that can be drawn from these internal and external reflections is that I must have been created with the purpose of servitude and submission to my master - just like every other creation in this universe. And if I do not fulfill that purpose, there will be hell to pay. ظلم in classical Arabic is defined as: وَضَعَ الشَّئَی غَیرَ مَحَلِّہ To put something in its wrong place.

title: ADAB
text: At the heart of every beginning is ادب A good translation for the word ادب is comportment which means comes from two Latin words, meaning "how you carry yourself". Porter is derived from it, because a porter is someone who carries your luggage. Comportment is the way in which you carry yourself in the presence of someone or something. ادب is not something that is dictated by the شریعۃ . The idea behind ادب is that it is the most natural thing for a person to have. Because most of ادب is simply common sense. Allah(Subhanahu wa Ta'ala) has placed the perfect demonstration of ادب without our own existence. The only reason we benefit from our bodies is because it submits to the hierarchy of the soul. There is an angelic and divine presence when Allah's name is mentioned وَإِذَا سَأَلَكَ عِبَادِى عَنِّى فَإِنِّى قَرِيبٌ And when My slaves ask you, [O Muhammad], about Me - indeed I am near. أُجِيبُ دَعْوَةَ ٱلدَّاعِ إِذَا دَعَانِ I respond to the call of the supplicant when he calls upon me.

title: European Revolution
text: 2 movements sprang forward, as a direct result of the Church's oppression. The protestant movement that states that the Catholic church is oppressive - we should all be able to read the bible ourselves, and we are entitled to our interpretations of the bible. The scientific movement that states that everything the Church is preaching, doesn't even make any scientific sense. Therefore we need to come to that what makes sense! And what makes sense is science; what makes sense is philosophy; what makes sense is logic.

title: Spiritual Decline
text: Emphasis on God got replaced by an emphasis on the study of universe Emphasis on Soul got replaced by an emphasis on studying the body Emphasis on afterlife got replaced by human sciences. Morality dictated by revelation got replaced by logic. What was once considered unthinkable and immoral is being celebrated today Live-in and premarital relations What was rated "R" 10 years ago, today that same criteria is rated "PG-13". Profanity in language is celebrated Fashion industry is moving more and more towards nudity in the name of "expressing sexuality". The new slogan became "spirituality does not matter! What matters is physicality"

title: Understanding Allah's Light
text: Light [24:35] [ سورۃ ۲۴] النور ‏ ٱللَّهُ نُورُ ٱلسَّمَوَتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ مَثَلُ نُورِهِۦ كَمِشْكَوٰةٍۢ فِيهَا مِصْبَاحٌ ۖ ٱلْمِصْبَاحُ فِى زُجَاجَةٍ ۖ ٱلزُّجَاجَةُ كَأَنَّهَا كَوْكَبٌۭ دُرِّىٌّۭ يُوقَدُ مِن شَجَرَةٍۢ مُّبَرَكَةٍۢ زَيْتُونَةٍۢ لَّا شَرْقِيَّةٍۢ وَلَا غَرْبِيَّةٍۢ يَكَادُ زَيْتُهَا يُضِىٓءُ وَلَوْ لَمْ تَمْسَسْهُ نَارٌۭ ۚ نُّورٌ عَلَىٰ نُورٍۢ ۗ يَهْدِى ٱللَّهُ لِنُورِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَيَضْرِبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْأَمْثَلَ لِلنَّاسِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌۭ ‎ ۳۵ Allah is the Light of the heavens and the earth. The example of His light is like a niche within which is a lamp, the lamp is within glass, the glass as if it were a pearly [white] star lit from [the oil of] a blessed olive tree, neither of the east nor of the west, whose oil would almost glow even if untouched by fire. Light upon light. Allah guides to His light whom He wills. And Allah presents examples for the people, and Allah is Knowing of all things

title: Internal Vs External Light
text: Allah begins the verse with: ‏ ٱللَّهُ نُورُ ٱلسَّمَوَتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ Light is of two kinds - physical and spiritual, and Allah is the source of both types of light. To be able to see anything, we need an internal light within our eyes and we also need sunlight which is external light Allah created us with an internal spiritual light which is our فطرۃ , and he provided us with an external light which is the Quran. قال مولانا علی علیہ السلام رَأيتُ العقلَ عَقلَين ... فمَطبُوعٌ وَمَسمُوعُ۔ وَلا يَنفَعُ مَسْمُوعٌ إِذَا لم يَكُ مَطبُوع۔ كَما لا تَنفَعُ الشَّمْسُ وَضَوءَ العَينِ مَمْنُوع I see that intellects are of two types... internal (physical) and external (spiritual). The internal (physical) intellect cannot benefit until it is combined with the external (spiritual) intellect. Just as (light of the) sun cannot be beneficial if the light (sight) of the eye is missing. There is no comparison between the intensity of our light and Allah's light.

title: Understanding The Parable
text: Light [24:35] [ سورۃ ۲۴] النور ‏ ٱللَّهُ نُورُ ٱلسَّمَوَتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ مَثَلُ نُورِهِۦ كَمِشْكَوٰةٍۢ فِيهَا مِصْبَاحٌ ۖ ٱلْمِصْبَاحُ فِى زُجَاجَةٍ ۖ ٱلزُّجَاجَةُ كَأَنَّهَا كَوْكَبٌۭ دُرِّىٌّۭ يُوقَدُ مِن شَجَرَةٍۢ مُّبَرَكَةٍۢ زَيْتُونَةٍۢ لَّا شَرْقِيَّةٍۢ وَلَا غَرْبِيَّةٍۢ يَكَادُ زَيْتُهَا يُضِىٓءُ وَلَوْ لَمْ تَمْسَسْهُ نَارٌۭ ۚ نُّورٌ عَلَىٰ نُورٍۢ ۗ يَهْدِى ٱللَّهُ لِنُورِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَيَضْرِبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْأَمْثَلَ لِلنَّاسِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌۭ ‎ ۳۵ Allah is the Light of the heavens and the earth. The example of His light is like a niche within which is a lamp, the lamp is within glass, the glass as if it were a pearly [white] star lit from [the oil of] a blessed olive tree, neither of the east nor of the west, whose oil would almost glow even if untouched by fire. Light upon light. Allah guides to His light whom He wills. And Allah presents examples for the people, and Allah is Knowing of all things

title: Free Will
text: The Arabic word for exercising free will is اختیار which comes from خیر and means "good". It indicates that the only course of action that one can choose, is good. Evil acts are chosen because one believes them to be good for them. Free will requires مجاھدۃ . Mastery in this world requires hard work, but the fruit of mastery is the most joyful gift that we have been provided with in this world. Strive for perfection is in the ranks of عبودیۃ . Rasul Allah(Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam) said: إن الله أُمِرۃُ إِلَيَّ أن تَواضَعُوا حتى لا يَفتَخِر أَحَدٌ على أَحَد، ولا يبغي أَحَدٌ على أَحَد Indeed Allah commanded me to humble myself until no one showed arrogance towards another person. وقال أنا سَیَّدِ وُلِدَ آدم ولا فخر I am the master of the children of Adam, and I say that without pride What elevated Rasul Allah(Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam) in his ranks was his servitude to Allah(Subhanahu wa Ta'ala) and not his mastery over humanity

title: Why did Allah allow Iblis his reprieve?
text: Allah shares the story of Adam and Iblis in سورۃ الاعراف . وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَكُمْ ثُمَّ صَوَّرْنَكُمْ And when Allah created Adam and fashioned him ثُمَّ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلَٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِآدَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ He then commanded the angels to bow down to him. They all did except Iblis. لَمْ يَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّجِدِينَ He was never going to be from among those who submit. قَالَ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَلَّا تَسْجُدَ إِذْ أَمَرْتُكَ What possibly could stop you from prostrating to Adam when I commanded you to do so? قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْهُ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍۢ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍۢ He said, I am better than him. You created me from fire and you created him from clay. قَالَ فَٱهْبِطْ مِنْهَا Fall out of here.. Leave! I am casting you out فَمَا يَكُونُ لَكَ أَن تَتَكَبَّرَ فِيهَا You no longer deserve to stay in this place because of your arrogance. فَٱخْرُجْ إِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلصَّغِرِينَ Get out of here, for you are the inferior one. Iblis says: قَالَ أَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ He says give me some reprieve. Allah responds: قَالَ إِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ You have reprieve until the day of judgment Why did Allah allow Iblis his reprieve? Iblis is not standing against Allah. He is standing against Adam and the children of Adam. Allah allowed Iblis his reprieve because of his trust and faith in the children of Adam. He created Adam to represent him as his خلیفۃ on earth. Why doesn't Allah grant paradise to all of creation irrespective of their actions? That would be against the concept of justice. أَمْ نَجْعَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّلِحَتِ كَٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ Should I make the one who believes and does good deeds equal to the one who creates mischief on this earth? أَمْ نَجْعَلُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ كَٱلْفُجَّارِ Should I make the pious equal to the wretched?

title: Deep Seated Friendship
text: The word خلیل comes from the root word خلۃ which is from the same root is خلال which means flossing. It is used when something goes into or in between something else A خلیل is someone whose friendship penetrates deep within your heart. Allah(Subhanahu wa Ta'ala) uses the word خلیل in interesting ways in the Quran The Cow [2:254] [ سورۃ ۲] البقرۃ ‏يَٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ آمَنُوٓا۟ أَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا رَزَقْنَكُم مِّن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِىَ يَوْمٌۭ لَّا بَيْعٌۭ فِيهِ وَلَا خُلَّةٌۭ وَلَا شَفَعَةٌۭ ۗ وَٱلْكَفِرُونَ هُمُ ٱلظَّلِمُونَ ‎ ۲۵۴ O Believers! Spend from that which we have provided for you, before a Day comes when there will be no bargaining, nor friendship, nor intercession. And it is the disbelievers who are the Zalimun . He also says : Ornaments of Gold [43:67] [ سورۃ ۴۳] الزخرف ‏ ٱلْأَخِلَّآءُ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بَعْضُهُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ إِلَّا ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ ‎ ۶۷ Don't let the wrong kind of person be your خلیل because when the day of judgment comes around, the wrongdoer says: The Criterion [25:27-28] [ سورۃ ۲۵] الفرقان ‏وَيَوْمَ يَعَضُّ ٱلظَّالِمُ عَلَىٰ يَدَيْهِ يَقُولُ يَلَيْتَنِى ٱتَّخَذْتُ مَعَ ٱلرَّسُولِ سَبِيلًۭا ‎ ۲۷ And the Day when the ظالم will chew up his own hands, He will say: "if only I took on a path alongside the messenger (Salallahu alayhi wa aalihee wa sallam)" ‏يَوَيْلَتَىٰ لَيْتَنِى لَمْ أَتَّخِذْ فُلَانًا خَلِيلًۭا ‎ ۲۸ "Ah! Woe to me! Would that I had never taken so-and-so as a friend! [ سورۃ ۲۵] الفرقان ‏يَوَيْلَتَىٰ لَيْتَنِى لَمْ أَتَّخِذْ فُلَانًا خَلِيلًۭا ‎ ۲۸ "Ah! Woe to me! Would that I had never taken so-and-so as a friend!
